2605.06240.title: Cumulative-Goodness Free-Riding in Forward-Forward Networks: Real, Repairable, but Not Accuracy-Dominant
2605.06240.paper_summary: Forward-Forward (FF) training allows each layer to learn from a local goodness criterion. In cumulative-goodness variants, however, later layers can inherit a task that earlier layers have already partially separated. We formalize this phenomenon as layer free-riding: under the softplus FF criterion, the class-discrimination gradient reaching block $d$ decays exponentially with the positive margin accumulated by preceding blocks. We then study three local remedies -- per-block, hardness-gated, and depth-scaled -- that recover current-layer separation measures without relying on backpropagated gradients. On CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, these remedies dramatically improve layer-separation statistics, with $4\times$--$45\times$ gains in deeper layers, while changing accuracy by less than one percentage point for non-degenerate training procedures. Tiny ImageNet provides a tougher cross-dataset check for our selected block-wise configuration and reveals the same qualitative gap between layer-health diagnostics and final accuracy. Calibration experiments further show that architecture and augmentation choices have a larger effect on final accuracy than the training-rule modifications studied here. Cumulative free-riding is therefore a real and repairable optimization pathology. Nonetheless, for the FF training rules, architectures, and datasets we study, it is not the dominant factor limiting achievable accuracy.
2605.06240.paper_summary_zh: 前向前向（FF）訓練允許每一層根據局部良好標準進行學習。<lb/>然而，在累積良好變體中，後面的層可以繼承早期層已經部分分離的任務。<lb/>我們將這一現象形式化為層的搭便車：在 softplus FF 標準下，達到區塊 $d$ 的類別區分梯度隨著前面區塊累積的正邊際指數衰減。<lb/>然後我們研究三種局部補救措施——每區塊、困難閘控和深度縮放——這些措施在不依賴反向傳播梯度的情況下恢復當前層的分離度量。<lb/>在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上，這些補救措施顯著改善了層分離統計，深層的增益達到 $4\times$--$45\times$，而對於非退化訓練程序，準確度變化不到一個百分點。<lb/>Tiny ImageNet 為我們選擇的區塊配置提供了一個更嚴格的跨數據集檢查，並揭示了層健康診斷與最終準確度之間的相同質量差距。<lb/>校準實驗進一步顯示，架構和增強選擇對最終準確度的影響大於我們在此研究的訓練規則修改。<lb/>因此，累積搭便車是一種真實且可修復的優化病理。<lb/>儘管如此，對於我們研究的 FF 訓練規則、架構和數據集，它並不是限制可達準確度的主導因素。
2605.06240.author: Amirhossein Yousefiramandi et.al.
